title: Totem Auto-Equip
description: Automatically equips Totem of Undying to your offhand when missing. Features combat mode, configurable delays, and Mod Menu support.
body:
# 🛡️ Totem Auto-Equip

**Never die because you forgot to re-equip your totem!**

This lightweight Fabric mod automatically detects when your Totem of Undying is used and instantly equips a new one from your inventory.

---

## ✨ Features

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| � *m*Auto-Equip** | Automatically equips totem when offhand is empty |
| ⚔️ **Combat Mode** | Only activate during combat (optional) |
| 📦 **Smart Search** | Main inventory first, hotbar last |
| ⚡ **Fast & Light** | Minimal performance impact |
| 🎮 **Mod Menu** | Easy in-game configuration |
| 🔧 **Configurable** | Adjust delays and behavior |

---

## 🎯 How It Works

> 1️⃣ Your totem pops and saves you
> 
> 2️⃣ Mod detects empty offhand
> 
> 3️⃣ Opens inventory automatically
> 
> 4️⃣ Finds totem in your inventory
> 
> 5️⃣ Swaps to offhand
> 
> 6️⃣ Closes inventory
> 
> ✅ **Protected again in milliseconds!**

---

## ⚙️ Configuration

| Setting | Description | Default |
|---------|-------------|---------|
| 🟢 **Enabled** | Toggle mod on/off | ON |
| ⚔️ **Combat Mode** | Only when taking damage | OFF |
| ⏱️ **Action Delay** | Time between actions | 100ms |
| 🔄 **Cooldown** | Wait after equipping | 500ms |

---

## 📥 Requirements

- 🎮 Minecraft **1.21.4+**
- 🧵 Fabric Loader
- 📦 Fabric API *(required)*
- 🎛️ Mod Menu *(optional)*

---

## ⚠️ Server Disclaimer

> **USE AT YOUR OWN RISK**
> 
> This mod automates inventory actions. Some servers may consider this cheating.
> 
> ❌ May be banned on competitive servers
> 
> ❌ May trigger anti-cheat
> 
> ✅ Safe for singleplayer
> 
> ✅ Safe for private servers

**Always check server rules before using!**

---

## 🔒 Anti-Ban Tips

- 📋 Check server rules first
- ⏱️ Use higher delays (200-300ms) on strict servers
- ⚔️ Enable Combat Mode to reduce detection
- 🚫 Disable on competitive servers if unsure

---
